memory.summary: I plan to finish analysis and reading, but a friend from cohort_3 is inviting me to lunch now.
I worked on the analysis section for an hour, but my friend from cohort_3 is now gathering everyone for lunch.
I planned to finish analysis and reading, but a friend from cohort_3 invited me to lunch. I worked on the analysis for an hour before being pulled away.
After working two hours on the analysis section, I realize it is now due in under an hour and remains incomplete. My energy and stress levels are high, complicating my ability to finish quickly.
I worked on the analysis section for an hour, but the deadline has passed and the task remains unfinished with only 0.78 progress.
I missed the 'assignment_A' deadline because I prioritized a lunch meeting instead of completing my analysis task.
I missed the deadline again while working on analysis, leaving me with high stress and only 2 hours of sleep before another urgent deadline.
I cannot find 'assignment_A' to work on, confirming I missed the deadline. With high stress and low sleep, this repeated failure worsens my situation.
Letting the moment pass confirms I missed another deadline, worsening my stress and sleep debt without resolving the missing assignment.
I completed the analysis section but failed to finish the reading deadline again. My stress remains high and sleep debt continues to grow.
No 'assignment_A' exists, confirming I missed the deadline. My stress and sleep debt continue to rise without progress.
After one hour, progress is minimal (0.03). High stress and sleep debt persist without resolving the missing assignment.
